displayTitle: Legends Epic Collection: The Clone Wars Vol. 3
synopsis: Collects Star Wars: Republic (2002) #68-73; Star Wars: General Grievous (2005) #1-4 (between Republic #68-69); Free Comic Book Day 2006: Star Wars; Star Wars: Obsession (2004) #1-5; and material from Star Wars Visionaries (2005) GN and Star Wars Tales (1999) #17
title: Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Clone Wars Vol. 3
